blocked_by.summary: The repo-local dependency security baseline is in place, but GitHub repository security settings still require an admin-side confirmation or enablement pass when the implementer lacks valid repo-admin authentication.
blocked_by.last_verified_by: dependency-security baseline verification and GitHub settings follow-up @ 2026-04-04T00:00:00+09:00

resume_condition: a repository admin confirms Dependency graph, Dependabot alerts, Dependabot security updates, and Dependabot malware alerts are enabled.
fallback_focus: normal feature work with GitHub-centered dependency monitoring active in code and CI
